summary: This document is a logo/branding image for 'SPACEHAT' showing a stylized illustration of a wizard or party hat with a star design on a colorful cosmic background. It contains no scientific, technical, or biotech-related content.

content_blocks.title: SPACEHAT Logo
content_blocks.content: A decorative logo featuring a blue wizard/party hat with an orange band sitting atop a multicolored star, set against a purple and blue cosmic background with scattered colorful dots representing stars. The text 'SPACEHAT' appears in bold yellow letters at the bottom. This is purely a branding/identity graphic with no scientific or technical information.
